arts.ttl: Tottenham agree deal worth £12.5m plus add-ons for Slavia Prague goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky
arts.sum: Tottenham have agreed a £12.5million deal to sign goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky from Slavia Prague. The 21-year-old is due in London on Saturday ahead of having a medical in the evening.

arts.ttl: Spurs v Newcastle team news: Botman returns, illness hits hosts
arts.sum: James Maddison and Son Heung-min are only among the subs The post Spurs v Newcastle team news: Botman returns, illness hits hosts appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Newcastle: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Live updates from the 12.30pm GMT kick-off Why not email Barry with your thoughts Those teams: As expected, third choice goalkeeper Brandon Austin starts for Spurs and the 25-year-old from Hemel Hemstead will make his first senior appearance in English football following short loan spells in Denmark and the USA. The most recent of those, with Orlando, was in 2021. Elsewhere in the side, Timo Werner starts ahead of Son Heung-min, while James Maddison is on the bench. Djed Spence gets another start, in place of the injured Destiny Udogie. Lucas Bergvall starts in place of the suspended Rodrigo Bentancur. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sven Botman decision made as Newcastle United team sheet lands at Spurs
arts.sum: NEWCASTLE UNITED : Dubravka, Livramento, Botman, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Bruno, Joelinton; Gordon, Murphy, Isak. Botman replaced the suspended Swiss star Fabian Schar who picked up a ban after his booking at Manchester United in the final game of last year.

arts.ttl: Tottenham-Newcastle lineups confirmed as Ange Postecoglou hands debut to 25-year-old
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur goalkeeper Brandon Austin makes his competitive debut for the Lilywhites in their Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Fraser Forster's Tottenham days are numbered as Ange forks out £12.5m for new keeper
arts.sum: The former Celtic shot stopper has had a torrid time covering for the injured Guglielmo Vicario

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Newcastle LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as goalkeeper Brandon Austin makes debut
arts.sum: Spurs sit in 11th at the start of the year, while the Magpies are still on the hunt for European football

arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky: Who is Tottenham's new goalkeeper ahead of £12.5m January transfer?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly on the verge of completing a £12.5m deal for 21-year-old Slavia Prague goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Newcastle - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Son Heung-min and James Maddison start on the bench for injury-hit hosts as Sven Botman returns for in-form visitors after 10 months out
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's coverage of the Premier League clash between Tottenham and Newcastle at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium for the live score, team news and latest updates.

arts.ttl: Spurs goalkeeper Austin makes debut vs Newcastle who have Botman back LIVE!
arts.sum: The Premier League's first weekend of 2025 begins with the lunchtime kick-off between Spurs and Newcastle at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Postecoglou needs a result too with his side sitting in the bottom half and winless in five Premier League home games.
